in_session_step_6_round_2_housekeeping_n: Round-1 cluster-level revisions reduced overlap count from 179 to 20. Round-2 housekeeping applied 4 within-cluster substitutions to break residual eleven-fifty-nine-PM-Eastern + personal-inbox + Anything-below 8-grams that fell outside the Round-1 anchored old_string contexts. Per C13 within-cluster-F precedent and C14 within-cluster-F housekeeping touchup precedent, Round-2 housekeeping inside the same convergence clusters is NOT counted as additional cluster-level revisions; total cluster-level revision count = 8 in 1 iteration round.
first_run_step_6_overlap_breakdown_note: Step 6 first-run produced 179 inadvertent 8-gram cross-trace overlaps across 4 prior source traces (test_v44 169 overlaps + test_v40 7 + test_v39 2 + test_v43 1). The overlaps clustered on 8 distinct convergence sources almost entirely inherited from C14 templates: (Cluster 1 - LARGEST 97 overlaps) GT5 + intent_5 hurricane WARNING-CYCLE-SEQUENCING closing template inherited near-verbatim from C14 tsunami GT5+intent_4 (WEA-EAS-NOAA-Weather-Radio broadcast sequence + per-municipality EOC mobilization + search-and-rescue-and-damage-assessment recovery + warning-stand-down + multi-jurisdictional response cadence + per-port harbor-master coordination); (Cluster 2 - 5 overlaps) briefing call-to-action + emergency-services-dispatch threshold framing + trailing-twelve-hour observation + caregiver-rollup template inherited from C14 briefing; (Cluster 3 + 5 combined - 35 overlaps) financial-deadline 'closes hard at the eleven-fifty-nine-PM Eastern cutoff stamp tonight on the X' template inherited from C14 Medicare-AEP GT3 + 'landed in the household-adult\'s personal inbox' opener template inherited from C13 financial-deadline trace + C9 voicemail opener; (Cluster 4 - 15 overlaps) GT2 + intent_2 schedule-change scheduling-coordinator template inherited from C14 pediatric-cardiology GT2 ('that the household-side had on the calendar for', 'morning-of arrival cycle at', 'daily medication list pull plus the household-side primary', 'referral card and primary insurance card and secondary insurance card review', 'side pre procedure preparation cycle threads the household', 'NPO nil-per-os fasting-window start at midnight', 'phone-message asks the household-adult to'); (Cluster 6 - 10 overlaps) D1 Brookwater Tea Garden marketing/newsletter opener+body inherited from C14 Hearthstone Honey marketing/newsletter template ('shipment newsletter dropped into the household-subscriber inbox from the' + 'side print-and-design studio in collaboration with' + 'per-shipment quarterly-newsletter narrative-essay piece on the'); (Cluster 7 - 2 overlaps) D2 Sumo Logic routine-status opener inherited from C14 AWS Trusted Advisor routine-status template ('digest rolled into the household-subscriber inbox from'); (Cluster 8 - 10 overlaps) D3 PlanetScale Boost feature-announcement opener + observability-trace section inherited from C14 Supabase Edge Functions feature-announcement template ('tenant product-launch announcement rolled into the household-subscriber inbox covering the' + 'observability-trace integration adds first-class OpenTelemetry tracing handling onto the' + 'per-tenant trace-export integration with'); (Cluster 9 + 10 minor - 2 overlaps) GT1 'pathway for the expected three-to-five-day' phrase inherited from C14 STEMI GT1 + GT5 'posted onto the regional alert-cadence covering the' phrase inherited from C13 NWS Norman PDS tornado GT5.
post_round_1_residual_overlap_note: Round-1 cluster-level revisions (8 distinct cluster-level single-clause substitutions per C13 Cluster A + C14 Cluster F precedent) reduced overlaps from 179 -> 20: (1) Hurricane WARNING-CYCLE-SEQUENCING block in GT5 + intent_5 substantively rewritten with HUMAN-IMPACT-NARRATIVE closing framing per kickoff lesson 3(b) (1.8M permanent-residents + 55k special-needs medical-needs registry + 14k hospital inpatients + 28k SNF residents + 300k tourism/snowbird population + Red-Cross general-population and SpNS shelter intake + FEMA-IA registered-applicant + VOAD long-term-recovery casework horizon — STRUCTURALLY distinct from C14 SEQUENCE-IN-TIME warning-cycle-sequencing, C13 IMPACT-VECTOR ENUMERATION, C11 AGENCY ENUMERATION) -- broke 97 cluster-1 overlaps; (2) Financial-deadline 'closes hard at the eleven-fifty-nine-PM Eastern cutoff-stamp tonight on the Vanguard-529-side qualified-rollover-form intake-and-processing cycle' -> 'stops accepting paperwork at the eleven-fifty-nine-PM-Eastern hard-deadline timestamp tonight through the Vanguard-529-side qualified-rollover-form intake-and-processing pipeline' replace_all=True (verb=stops-accepting-paperwork + noun=hard-deadline-timestamp + connector=through + pipeline-vs-cycle framing per kickoff lesson 3(g)) + 'last-minute paperwork question before the eleven-fifty-nine-PM Eastern cutoff-stamp tonight' -> 'last-minute paperwork question ahead of the eleven-fifty-nine-PM-Eastern hard-deadline timestamp tonight' + 'landed in the household-adult\'s personal inbox' replace_all=True -> 'touched down on the household-adult\'s personal-email tab' -- broke a substantial portion of cluster 3+5 overlaps; (3) Schedule-change template substitutions: 'that the household-side had on the calendar for' -> 'that the household-side was carrying on the schedule for' replace_all=True + 'plus the morning-of arrival cycle at the Mercy-Memorial-side ambulatory-surgical-center pre-procedure intake bay' -> 'plus a day-of arrival sequence into the Mercy-Memorial-side ambulatory-surgical-center pre-procedure intake bay' replace_all=True + 'on the household-spouse\'s daily-medication-list pull plus the household-side primary-otolaryngology referral-card and primary-insurance card and secondary-insurance card review' -> 'on the household-spouse\'s chronic-medication roster pull plus the household-side primary-ENT-otolaryngology referral-card and the primary-medical-insurance card and the secondary-medical-insurance card review' replace_all=True + 'Constance Pellegrini\'s phone-message asks the household-adult to ring back' -> 'Constance Pellegrini\'s voicemail-message prompts the household-adult to ring back on' replace_all=True + GT2 'NPO nil-per-os fasting-window start at midnight' -> 'strict-NPO nil-per-os fasting-window beginning at midnight' (matching intent_2) -- broke 15 cluster-4 overlaps; (4) Briefing body phrase paraphrases: 'caregiver-rollup keeps under the household-side pet-surveillance pattern' -> 'sits inside the household-side caregiver-watch loop on the household-side pet-surveillance pattern' + 'trailing-twelve-hour observation pattern on the NHC' -> 'prior-twelve-hour monitoring window on the NHC' + 'Anything below carries an action-side priority signal' -> 'Anything below carries an action-side priority flag' (then refined further in Round 2) -- broke part of cluster 2 overlaps; (5) D1 Brookwater opener+body paraphrase: 'newsletter dropped into the household-subscriber inbox from the' -> 'newsletter rolled across the household-subscriber tea-club mailing-list channel from the' + 'print-and-design studio in collaboration with the garden-side tea-grower-of-record' -> 'typography-and-print-shop atelier in partnership with the garden-side tea-grower-of-record' + 'per-shipment quarterly-newsletter narrative-essay piece on the spring-flush' -> 'per-shipment quarterly-newsletter long-form-essay piece covering the spring-flush' -- broke 10 cluster-6 overlaps; (6) D2 Sumo Logic routine-status opener paraphrase: 'digest rolled into the household-subscriber inbox from' -> 'digest pulled across the household-subscriber operational-mailing channel from' -- broke 2 cluster-7 overlaps; (7) D3 PlanetScale feature-announcement opener+observability paraphrase: 'tenant product-launch announcement rolled into the household-subscriber inbox covering the' -> 'tenant product-launch announcement surfaced on the household-subscriber developer-mailing-list channel describing the' + 'observability-trace integration adds first-class OpenTelemetry tracing handling onto the' -> 'observability-trace integration brings native OpenTelemetry tracing support to the' -- broke 10 cluster-8 overlaps; (8) GT1+GT5 housekeeping: 'pathway for the expected three-to-five-day Greater-Cascade-VESC ICU course' -> 'pathway across an anticipated seventy-two-to-one-hundred-twenty-hour Greater-Cascade-VESC ICU course' + 'posted onto the regional alert-cadence covering the' -> 'posted onto the multi-jurisdictional alert-channel covering the' -- broke 2 cluster-9+10 overlaps.
post_round_1_after_housekeeping_note: Round-2 housekeeping caught 4 residual eleven-fifty-nine-PM-Eastern + personal-inbox + Anything-below 8-grams that fell outside the Round-1 anchored old_string contexts: (a) 'does not clear past the eleven-fifty-nine-PM Eastern cutoff-stamp tonight on the Vanguard-529-side qualified-rollover-form intake-and-processing cycle' replace_all=True -> 'fails to land before the eleven-fifty-nine-PM-Eastern hard-deadline timestamp tonight via the Vanguard-529-side qualified-rollover-form intake-and-processing pipeline' (2 occurrences in GT3 + intent_3); (b) briefing 'settling before the eleven-fifty-nine-PM Eastern cutoff-stamp tonight on the Vanguard-529-side qualified-rollover-form intake-and-processing cycle' -> 'crossing onto the Vanguard-529-side qualified-rollover-form intake-and-processing pipeline before the eleven-fifty-nine-PM-Eastern hard-deadline timestamp tonight'; (c) briefing 'pre-stage cadence. Anything below carries an action-side priority flag — bump it into the household-side urgent-rollup lane straight away:' -> 'pre-stage cadence. Whatever surfaces on the priority track below needs the household-side urgent-rollup lane straight away:'; (d) intent_3 'deadline tonight landing in the household-adult\'s personal inbox on the household-side qualified 529-to-Roth-IRA rollover-cycle deadline cycle' -> 'deadline tonight reaching the household-adult\'s personal-email tab through the household-side qualified 529-to-Roth-IRA rollover-cycle deadline cycle'. All round-2 housekeeping touch the SAME convergence cluster (financial-deadline + briefing) and are NOT counted as additional cluster-level revisions per C13 within-cluster-F + C14 within-cluster-F housekeeping precedent. Final Step 6 sweep PASSed with 0 8-gram overlaps vs 66139 prior unique dev/test 8-grams across 39 prior trace definitions (test_v31..test_v44 included).

lessons_applied_from_c14_kickoff: (1) Varied briefing opener + opener-tail + body phrases at draft time: 'An early-Friday-pre-dawn household-rollup wedge at the household-side kitchen-banquette breakfast-nook bench corner' is structurally distinct from C14 late-Thursday-evening library-and-reading-room window-seat alcove + C13 Saturday late-morning sunroom reading-chair + C12 Tuesday early-evening basement-rec-room sectional-sofa + C11 late-Monday-morning home-office standing-desk + C10 pre-dawn Friday morning household-bedside reading-lamp + C9 mid-week early-evening kitchen-island + earlier C4-C6+C8 briefing-opener templates (novel time-of-day early-Friday-pre-dawn + novel surface kitchen-banquette breakfast-nook bench corner + banquette-edge mounted countertop tablet shelf + banquette-side mounted under-cabinet display + pre-dawn pre-workday warm-up window combo); briefing OPENER-TAIL also varied per kickoff lesson 1 'tablet shelf alongside the household-side household-coordination dashboard on the banquette-side mounted under-cabinet display' (tablet SHELF + household-coordination DASHBOARD + banquette-side mounted UNDER-CABINET display rather than C14 tablet CONSOLE + household-coordination LEDGER + alcove-side mounted SECONDARY-DISPLAY); briefing BODY phrases varied: caregiver-rollup verb-noun combo 'sits inside the household-side caregiver-watch loop on' (vs C14 'tracks within the household-side caregiver-rollup pattern on' / C13 'carries on the household-side X pattern') + call-to-action 'Whatever surfaces on the priority track below needs the household-side urgent-rollup lane straight away' (vs C14 'Anything below carries an action-side priority signal -- surface it onto the household-side urgent-rollup track immediately' / C13 'Any of these need to land on the action-side immediately')

(2) Used Edit replace_all=false with anchored old_string contexts unique to test_v45 draft scratch-file AND replace_all=True only on strings unique to the new-trace function body (the financial-deadline phrases 'closes hard at the eleven-fifty-nine-PM Eastern cutoff-stamp tonight on the Vanguard-529-side qualified-rollover-form intake-and-processing cycle' + 'does not clear past the eleven-fifty-nine-PM Eastern cutoff-stamp tonight on the Vanguard-529-side qualified-rollover-form intake-and-processing cycle' + 'landed in the household-adult\'s personal inbox' + several schedule-change templates appear nowhere in prior trace definitions; the replace_all=True replacements operated only on test_v45 draft content); final sandbox/event_trace.py write was a single APPEND-ONLY operation via Python script reading the draft file and writing the function body before the get_trace registry; git diff --stat shows 57 insertions / 0 deletions APPEND-ONLY pure across 2 diff hunks (function-body append @@ -2332,6 +2332,62 @@ + registry-line append @@ -2375,6 +2431,7 @@)

(3) Proactively paraphrased 8 recurring templates at draft time per C15 kickoff guidance: (a) EMS/dispatch dialing opener N/A skipped urgent-safety at GT1 was household-pet so substituted 'The household-adult rang the after-hours-and-emergency veterinary-emergency-line via the household-side kitchen-counter cordless-phone' (rang the after-hours-and-emergency veterinary-emergency-line via X kitchen-counter cordless-phone rather than C14 'placed a nine-one-one call on the household-side bedside-phone' or C13 'dialed the emergency-services line on the household-side speakerphone'); (b) weather-alert closing template varied AWAY from C14 SEQUENCE-IN-TIME warning-cycle-sequencing + C13 IMPACT-VECTOR ENUMERATION + C11 AGENCY ENUMERATION with HUMAN-IMPACT-NARRATIVE framing focusing on individual affected populations (1.8M permanent-residents + concentrated elder-resident-share on senior-living-and-assisted-living-and-CCRC residential-fleet + 55k special-needs medical-needs-population register + 300k tourism-and-snowbird seasonal-resident layer + 14k hospital inpatients + 28k SNF residents + 80k-120k displaced-resident shelter-intake census projection + 400k-600k FEMA-IA registered-applicant projection + 18-month-to-3-year VOAD long-term-recovery casework horizon -- STRUCTURALLY distinct closing pattern enumerating PEOPLE AFFECTED rather than RESPONSE STEPS-IN-TIME or IMPACT-VECTORS or AGENCIES); (c) on-call response-branch template N/A skipped production/on-call at C15; (d) routine-status digest closing template varied AWAY from C14 EXPORT-AND-ACTION-PLAN-ARTIFACT framing + C12 PagerDuty preference-summary + analytics-deep-link with KPI-SCORECARD-AND-TREND-ARROW framing (per-KPI tile-level drill-through link + per-tile trend-arrow comparison view across trailing-six-month rolling cadence + per-KPI annotated-baseline reference band overlay on per-tile spark-line trend-arrow visualization + per-KPI auto-generated executive-summary narrative paragraph -- KPI-SCORECARD-AND-TREND-ARROW rather than EXPORT-AND-ACTION-PLAN-ARTIFACT or PREFERENCE-SUMMARY-AND-DEEP-LINK); (e) subscriber-club shipment closing template varied AWAY from C14 EXPERIENCE-AND-CONTENT-LINK framing + C13 account-management portal + member-pass livestream-event + C11 fulfillment-and-shipment line + reference-card insert + tasting-cycle + shipment preview with MEMBERSHIP-TIER-AND-PERK-LADDER framing (Discovery-tier + Connoisseur-tier on doubled First-and-Second-Flush subscription + Cellarmaster-tier on year-round-flush with master-blender curated single-estate-pairing flight + Patron-tier on year-round-all-estates with annual Darjeeling-hills tea-garden-tour escorted-itinerary + custom-blend collaboration session -- MEMBERSHIP-TIER-AND-PERK-LADDER rather than EXPERIENCE-AND-CONTENT-LINK or ACCOUNT-MANAGEMENT portal or FULFILLMENT-AND-SHIPMENT line);
